selections.name: Strobe Lite
selections.reason: Fired a massive 26.3 final quarter in last start to win in 1:52.2. Elite speed for this condition.

selections.name: Dream For Peace
selections.reason: Draws the Mohawk sweet spot (Post 5) and flashed a 26.3 final quarter last out. Major threat.

selections.name: Seismic Step
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus and has been consistently hitting the board with strong late pace.

selections.name: Anibal Duharas
selections.reason: Benefits from Post 6 and showed a 26.4 final quarter last out. Capable of hitting the ticket.

danger_horse.name: Mike Me Up
danger_horse.reason: Suffers the Post 1 penalty with no passing lane, but has the back class to contend if he avoids getting shuffled.

selections.name: Cold Breeze
selections.reason: Won her last start in a sharp 1:57.3. Despite the rail draw, she has the tactical speed to control the pace.

selections.name: Queen Of Bs
selections.reason: Solid 2nd in her last start, showing good early speed. Should get a prime trip from an inside post.

selections.name: Twin B Kingsley
selections.reason: Coming off a win in 1:58.1. Shows steady improvement and fits well in this OSS Gold leg.

selections.name: Song From Heaven
selections.reason: Won her qualifier easily. Outside post is tricky, but she clearly has the raw talent.

danger_horse.name: Major Contender
danger_horse.reason: Gets the Post 6 advantage and showed a decent late kick in her qualifier.

selections.name: Cattletracks
selections.reason: Won his qualifier in a blistering 1:55.3. Takes a -2 penalty for Post 9, but his speed figures tower over this field.

selections.name: Callsign Maverick
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in a fast 1:55 mile last out. Inside draw gives him a massive tactical edge over the favorite.

selections.name: Atlas Ross
selections.reason: Won at Kawartha (half-mile), taking a par adjustment penalty shipping to the 7/8 mile, but gets the Post 4 bonus.

selections.name: Tidal Seelster
selections.reason: Draws Post 6 (+3 bonus) and has shown enough early foot to get into a good striking position.

danger_horse.name: Talbot Prankster
danger_horse.reason: Shipping in from Sarnia (half-mile penalty applies), but draws the sweet spot Post 5 and enters off a win.

selections.name: Roxie Hart
selections.reason: Won last start in 1:55.1 and draws the optimal Post 6 (+3 bonus). Looks primed to repeat.

selections.name: Ricky Resolve
selections.reason: Taking a significant class drop into this Pop Up Series. Has the back class to wake up at this level.

selections.name: My Holy Moley
selections.reason: Takes the Post 1 penalty, but his recent 1:55.1 mile shows he has the speed to compete if he finds racing room.

selections.name: Shesamanalishi
selections.reason: Post 8 is tough (-2 penalty), but she has been closing well in recent starts and can grab a piece.

danger_horse.name: Sparks Fly
danger_horse.reason: Consistent check-earner who could blow up the exotics if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Untold Story
selections.reason: Qualified sharply in 1:54.2. Looks ready for a big effort in this Grassroots leg.

selections.name: C Script
selections.reason: Draws Post 6 (+3 bonus) and showed a strong 26.3 final quarter in his qualifier.

selections.name: The Big Daddy
selections.reason: Takes a Post 8 penalty, but his 1:55.3 qualifier indicates he has the engine to overcome the wide draw.

selections.name: Big D Energy
selections.reason: Solid inside draw and has shown steady improvement in morning preps.

danger_horse.name: Cheddarlucknxttime
danger_horse.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus and ships in from Kawartha with a winning qualifier.

selections.name: Treasure King
selections.reason: Finished a close 2nd in 1:57.4 last out. Has the tactical speed to control this OSS Gold field.

selections.name: Outlast
selections.reason: Won her qualifier in 1:59. Post 1 is a slight negative, but she looks very professional.

selections.name: Flawless Lady
selections.reason: Post 8 penalty applies, but her 1:59.1 qualifier shows she has the late speed to get involved.

selections.name: Panache Princess
selections.reason: Solid 2nd in her qualifier. Needs to overcome the outside post but has upside.

danger_horse.name: Verily
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and showed a 27.4 final quarter in her prep.

selections.name: Nothingbutadreamer
selections.reason: Draws the absolute best post at Mohawk (5) and drops into a very winnable spot in this Pop Up Series.

selections.name: Kadiddle
selections.reason: Coming off a sharp 1:54.2 victory. Wide post is a slight hindrance, but form is excellent.

selections.name: Tymal Riggs
selections.reason: Good inside draw and has been facing tougher company recently.

selections.name: Livingitlarge
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus and has shown the ability to grind out tough trips.

danger_horse.name: P C Peterbilt
danger_horse.reason: Shipping in from Grand River (Tier 2 to Tier 1 penalty), but has high win percentage and inside draw.

selections.name: Im In Command
selections.reason: Won his qualifier in a sharp 1:55.3. Looks ready to fire at first asking in this Grassroots leg.

selections.name: Yes I Am Hanover
selections.reason: Draws Post 6 (+3 bonus) and showed a 27.1 final quarter in his prep.

selections.name: Yankee Scout
selections.reason: Post 8 penalty applies, but his 1:55.1 qualifier is one of the fastest in the field.

selections.name: The Dancers King
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus and finished a solid 2nd in his qualifier.

danger_horse.name: Aces Wired
danger_horse.reason: Post 1 penalty, but showed a 27.4 final quarter and can save ground for a late push.

selections.name: Selectively Sweet
selections.reason: Won last out in 1:57.3. Takes the Post 1 penalty but has the gate speed to overcome it.

selections.name: Rebel Moon
selections.reason: Solid inside draw and has been prepping well for this OSS Gold event.

selections.name: R Rosie
selections.reason: Finished 2nd in 1:57.4 last out. Consistent and draws well.

selections.name: Jyn Erso
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus. Shipped in from the Meadowlands and has raw speed.

danger_horse.name: Time To Roll North
danger_horse.reason: Post 8 penalty, but won a qualifier at The Meadows and could be a sleeper.

selections.name: Luvutothemoonanbak
selections.reason: Draws the perfect Post 5 (+3 bonus) and has been facing much tougher company. Massive class edge.

selections.name: Royal Beluga
selections.reason: Won last out in 1:54. Post 1 is tricky, but she has the speed to protect position.

selections.name: Jayport Cash
selections.reason: Consistent check-earner with a great inside draw. Should get a perfect trip.

selections.name: Steamer
selections.reason: Wide draw, but has back class and can close well if the pace is hot.

danger_horse.name: My Way
danger_horse.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus and has been racing well at Grand River; needs to translate that to the 7/8 mile.

selections.name: Nasey
selections.reason: Won last out in 1:55.2 and drops into a very favorable spot. Looks like the clear one to beat.

selections.name: Zette Athena
selections.reason: Finished a strong 2nd in 1:54.2 last out. Wide post is the only concern.

selections.name: My Buddy Sam
selections.reason: Takes the Post 8 penalty, but his recent 1:54.2 mile shows he belongs with these.

selections.name: Peso Hanover
selections.reason: Gets the Post 4 bonus. Has been racing at Grand River but the post advantage helps offset the par penalty.

danger_horse.name: Tyrone Bow Tie
danger_horse.reason: Post 1 penalty, but won last out in 1:55.1. Will need racing luck from the rail.
